text: Created ticket Migrate constitution, research, and initiative stores to shared storage

Completed the upstream package migration slice for `pi-constitution`, `pi-research`, and `pi-initiatives`. Constitution and research now use the shared async storage substrate as canonical truth with repo-materialized compatibility projections, and initiatives now use the same async shared-storage path while preserving projection readers for non-migrated consumers. Verified with `npm test -- --run packages/pi-initiatives/__tests__/dashboard.test.ts packages/pi-initiatives/__tests__/store.test.ts packages/pi-initiatives/__tests__/tools.test.ts packages/pi-initiatives/__tests__/commands.test.ts packages/pi-initiatives/__tests__/index.test.ts packages/pi-research/__tests__/store.test.ts packages/pi-research/__tests__/integration-smoke.test.ts packages/pi-research/__tests__/tools.test.ts packages/pi-research/__tests__/index.test.ts packages/pi-constitution/__tests__/store.test.ts packages/pi-constitution/__tests__/tools.test.ts packages/pi-constitution/__tests__/index.test.ts` and `npm run typecheck`.
